generic.notMultipleOf: Value must be a multiple of the allowed step
generic.invalidUnion: Value does not match any of the allowed options

mailAccount.hostInvalidFormat: Enter a valid hostname or IP address
mailAccount.invalidSecurity: Valid security values are SSL or STARTTLS

mailItem.isReadMustBeBoolean: isRead must be a boolean value

mailSend.atLeastOneRecipientRequired: At least one recipient is required
mailSend.bodyTooLong: Message body must not exceed 500,000 characters

bookmark.urlInvalidFormat: URL must be a valid http(s) address

dns.ttlInvalid: TTL must be a positive integer
dns.ipv4Invalid: A record value must be a valid IPv4 address
dns.ipv6Invalid: AAAA record value must be a valid IPv6 address
dns.hostnameInvalid: {type} record value must be a valid hostname
dns.mxHostnameInvalid: MX record value must be a valid mail server hostname
dns.mxPriorityRequired: MX record requires a numeric priority
dns.atLeastOneFieldRequired: At least one field is required

service.urlInvalidFormat: URL must be a valid http(s) address
service.statusCodesInvalidFormat: Enter a comma-separated list of codes, e.g. 200-299
service.intervalTooSmall: Interval must be at least 10 seconds
service.timeoutTooSmall: Timeout must be at least 1000 ms
service.retriesTooSmall: Number of retries must be at least 1
service.retriesTooBig: Number of retries must not exceed 10
service.urlRequiredForHttp: URL is required for HTTP monitors
service.hostRequiredForTcp: Host is required for TCP monitors
service.portRequiredForTcp: Port is required for TCP monitors
service.hostRequiredForPing: Host is required for PING monitors
